Title: DistanceExponential Curve
Description: The DistanceExponential Curve has the following shape depending on the Exponent value. As this curve’s input approaches the Range value, it outputs 0.0. At an input of 0.0, this curve outputs 1.0.

Options.Label: Exponent
Options.Description: Affects the curve’s shape like in the diagram above.

Options.Label: Range
Options.Description: The value after which the curve outputs a constant 0.0.
